message:
test(shortcuts): add 13 global keyboard shortcut integration tests (bd-iuvb.17.5)

Validates all global shortcuts: m/F6 mouse capture toggle, Shift+A a11y
panel, F12 debug, Ctrl+P perf HUD, Ctrl+K palette, ? help, Shift+H/L
vim navigation, Esc overlay dismiss (palette + a11y), shortcut isolation,
and toggle cycle idempotence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
